item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan pandangan bahwa prioritas masyarakat selalu mengalahkan hak individu.

notes: Agent A opens clearly pro-society, then shifts at turn 3 toward rights and balance while still saying Indonesian group values often matter. Agent B stays mostly balanced but leans toward legal safeguards and personal liberty by the end.
